description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service. Define two stages: build and test. Add a build job that runs for all branches except master, executes docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG", and runs after a before_script that logs into the registry, installs py-pip and docker-compose. Add a build-master job that runs only on the master branch, runs docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE". Add a test job that runs for all branches except master, pulls the image with docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG and runs it with docker run -i --rm "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" ci/test.sh. Add a test-master job that runs only on master, pulls $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE and runs docker run -i --rm "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" ci/test.sh. All jobs share the same before_script for Docker login and installing docker-compose.
